name: Meitu Liquid Granite Paint
file: Meitu Liquid Granite (Water-in-Water Colorful Paint Four in One).webp
src: /Liquid/Meitu Liquid Granite (Water-in-Water Colorful Paint Four in One).webp
leadtext: Meitu Liquid Granite paint is a new generation paint which gives an asthetic granite finish look to the surface. It is a water based paint suitable for both interior and exterior use with a long lasting and durable look of the surface where it is applied. Meitu granite paint is applied by using spray gun which is normally used for application of the texture paint. The natural granite texture of the coating gives people a sense of elegance, harmony, solemnity to achieve vivid, natural effect.
features: Provides a decorative and protective plastic coat
